task_objective: Fix updater post-install UI state: after a successful Decky installer handoff, the Updates panel must no longer show 'Update available' or an install button for the just-installed version. The UI should optimistically reflect the installed target version as current.
tests_added: tests/test_frontend_static.py::test_frontend_updater_post_install_ui_state — 9 behavioral assertions covering: shared success helper existence and call count, setCandidate(null) on success, current checkResult on success, installedOverride state, effectiveCurrentVersion computation, Installed Version rendering, RPC using effectiveCurrentVersion, stale-check coercion guard, override clearing on real version change

commits.message: fix(updater): reflect installed state after successful handoff

design_decisions: InstalledOverride interface holds { version, channel, preInstallVersion } — preInstallVersion is the real currentVersion at install time, used to detect when Decky has reloaded the plugin.

effectiveCurrentVersion = installedOverride?.version ?? currentVersion — computed from override, falls back to real prop. Used for Installed Version display, isLocalBuild, and checkForPluginUpdateCall RPC argument.

handleHandoffSuccess is a single shared React.useCallback helper called from both installer success paths (immediate and delayed timeout branch). It: logs handoff_resolved, sets installedOverride, writes current checkResult, clears candidate/errorMsg/isInstalling/isHandoffPending, and toasts.

Stale check coercion: inside checkForUpdates, if the server returns 'available' for a version matching installedOverride.version, we log stale_coerced=true and coerce to current rather than restoring the install button.

Override clearing: a useEffect watching [currentVersion, installedOverride] clears the override when currentVersion changes away from installedOverride.preInstallVersion — this fires after Decky reloads the plugin with the new version.

Backend (main.py, updater.py, service.py) is completely unchanged — record_update_install_requested still only saves pending metadata, installed_release_tag is still promoted only by startup reconciliation.

validation_results.pnpm_verify: passed (supply chain audit, typecheck, rollup build, typecheck)

subagent_review_result: [REVIEW_PASSED] — all 10 requirement categories verified. One low-severity non-blocking observation: L465 uses raw currentVersion.includes('dev') in label, unreachable after handoff (candidate is cleared). Not a behavioral regression.
codex_review_base_result: codex command not found in this environment — tool unavailable, non-operative.
manual_validation_scenarios: Plugin reload timing: does the override persist until Decky reloads the plugin process and currentVersion prop changes?
Delayed handoff path: slow network → handoffTimerFired=true → 'Waiting for Decky...' → transitions cleanly to 'Up to date'
Background update check racing during the override window
Version divergence edge case: Decky installs a different version than requested
